hotel.name: Iva By SKR
hotel.address: 65/1, Hosur Road, Hebbagodi, Electronic City, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560099

support.ticker: Iva By SKR — A Petrichor Hotel • Hebbagodi, Electronic City, Bengaluru • Call: +91 80 3520 9500
support.title: Guest Support
support.subtitle: Contact the hotel directly for booking terms, cancellations, refunds, or stay assistance.

hero.subtext: Inspired by petrichor, Iva By SKR offers comfortable rooms, warm hospitality, and modern conveniences opposite Hebbagodi Metro Station—well placed for business trips, family visits, and longer stays in Electronic City.

story.paragraph_1: Petrichor is the familiar scent of earth after the first rain: grounding, fresh, and quietly reassuring. That feeling inspires the hotel.
story.paragraph_2: Iva By SKR focuses on clean, comfortable rooms and practical hospitality for guests visiting Electronic City and south Bengaluru.
story.pull_quote: A convenient Hebbagodi stay with the metro opposite the hotel and Electronic City close by.

rooms.name: Classic
rooms.description: A comfortable room for business trips and short Bengaluru stays.

rooms.name: Deluxe
rooms.description: A spacious room with seating space to work or unwind.

rooms.name: Executive Suite
rooms.description: The hotel's largest room category, suited to longer stays.

amenities.title: 24×7 Gym
amenities.description: Open around the clock for resident guests.

faq.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.answer: Standard check-in is from 12:00 PM and check-out is by 11:45 AM. Please confirm early check-in or late check-out directly with the hotel.

faq.question: Is parking available?
faq.answer: Yes, on-site parking is available for hotel guests.

faq.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: Cancellation terms depend on the rate and booking platform. Review the terms shown when you book or contact the hotel before confirming.

faq.question: Do you accept group or corporate bookings?
faq.answer: Yes. Send an enquiry or contact the hotel directly to discuss group and corporate stays.
